description: §41.14.8 — <formFor for=Signup> has a struct-typed field (address: Address) but no <slot name="address"> override. v1.0 does NOT auto-recurse into nested struct fields, so this fires E-FORMFOR-NESTED-STRUCT-NO-SLOT.
rationale: §41.14.8: a struct-typed field with no explicit <slot name="<fieldName>"> override SHALL emit E-FORMFOR-NESTED-STRUCT-NO-SLOT (auto-recursive nested-struct rendering is reserved for v1.next per OQ-FF-11).
